# INRelevantShortcutRole.action

**Case**

An action-based relevant shortcut.

## Declaration

```swift
case action
```

## Discussion

Specify this role for relevant shortcuts that represent actions that the user may want to perform using your app, such as ordering tomato soup.

## Roles

- **INRelevantShortcutRole.information**: An informational-based relevant shortcut.
title: INRelevantShortcutRole.action
